# main app target

# aux_source_directory(. MAIN_APP_SRC)
# target_sources(app PRIVATE ${MAIN_APP_SRC}) # target generated by Zephyr package

target_sources(app PRIVATE main.c)
target_sources_ifdef(CONFIG_MYFUNCTION app PRIVATE my_function.c)

target_include_directories(app PRIVATE .)

target_link_libraries(app PRIVATE
    utils 
    platform
)
